title: US Airline Yearly Leaders
subtitle: Which Reporting_Airline flew the most completed flights each year (1987–2025), and where did leadership change most sharply? Click a handoff row to drill into that year. Requires the `ontime.fact_ontime` table.

panels.title: Yearly leader (flights) with margin over #2
panels.query: WITH ranked AS (SELECT Year AS y, Reporting_Airline AS carrier, count() AS flights, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY Year ORDER BY count() DESC) AS rk FROM ontime.fact_ontime WHERE Cancelled = 0 GROUP BY y, carrier) SELECT y AS year, anyIf(carrier, rk = 1) AS leader_airline, anyIf(flights, rk = 1) AS leader_flights, anyIf(flights, rk = 1) - anyIf(flights, rk = 2) AS margin FROM ranked GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

panels.title: Leadership handoffs
panels.query: WITH yl AS (SELECT y AS year, anyIf(carrier, rk = 1) AS leader_airline, anyIf(flights, rk = 1) AS leader_flights, anyIf(flights, rk = 2) AS runner_up_flights FROM (SELECT Year AS y, Reporting_Airline AS carrier, count() AS flights, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY Year ORDER BY count() DESC) AS rk FROM ontime.fact_ontime WHERE Cancelled = 0 GROUP BY y, carrier) GROUP BY y), changed AS (SELECT year AS year_of_change, lagInFrame(leader_airline) OVER (ORDER BY year) AS old_leader, leader_airline AS new_leader, leader_flights AS margin_this_year, runner_up_flights AS margin_prev_year FROM yl) SELECT * FROM changed WHERE old_leader != '' AND old_leader != new_leader ORDER BY year_of_change

SELECT count() AS flights, uniqExact(Reporting_Airline) AS airlines, countIf(Cancelled = 1) AS cancelled, countIf(DepDel15 = 0 AND Cancelled = 0) / count() AS ontime_share FROM ontime.fact_ontime WHERE Year = {{focus_year}}
